places.name: Bunker At Cape May Point
places.description: World War II bunker still standing on the New Jersey beach.

places.name: Sometimes Train Tracks of Sunset Beach
places.description: Several times a year, during low tide, two pairs of historic train tracks are revealed on this New Jersey beach.

places.name: Wreck of the S.S. Atlantus
places.description: The rusting remains are visible sticking out of the waters of the Delaware Bay.
